channel.title: Knows on Know
channel.description: Recent content in Knows on Know

item.title: Next Level Privacy
item.description:
If you’ve made it this far you have taken some major steps to improving your online digital privacy. Here are some further measures to gain greater privacy and sovereignty.

Decentralised social media

Nostr | nostr.com

A censorship-resistant social media protocol that does not depend on a single company or their servers — so you can’t be banned or have your posts removed. Nostr runs across multiple relays that you choose, so you can move your profile, data and earnings between client apps. Check out any of these to get started:

item.title: You're done
item.description:
You’ve worked through every section. That’s not nothing — most people never get this far.

Your data is harder to collect, your accounts are harder to crack and your digital life is more your own than it was when you started.

Privacy is not a destination, it’s a habit. Come back every few months, check what’s changed and keep tightening things up.

If you want to go further, Next Level is waiting.
